title: Central Point Police Department Flock Camera policy, invoice, map, and contracts

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Oregon Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting a copy of the following records, that have already been requested to Central Point Police Department. By requesting previously produced records, I am hopeful that this request will require minimal labor to locate, review and produce the records. Please let me know if you need any additional information or clarification regarding the records I am seeking.

The records I am seeking are:

(1) all policies Central Point Police Department has that oversee and/or regulate the operation and use of Automated License Plate Readers, including the operation and use of Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares
(2) a copy of any and all invoices Central Point Police Department has between any and all Automated License Plate Readers softwares and programs, including Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares
(3) a map of all ALPR cameras that Central Point Police Department owns, operates or has access to
(4) a copy of any and all license and user agreements, contracts, memorandums of understanding or other similar type documents that describe and/or regulate the use, retention, collection, and sharing of ALPR data including but not limited to the agreements between Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares

Please segregate all non-exempt material, and “black out” rather than “white out” any exempt material. Please cite specific exemptions in every instance that  the public body claims an exemption.

Thank you so much!

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Southern Oregon Flock Off

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Oregon Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting a copy of the following public records, which were recently produced under a previous public records request APD2025-441. 

-Policy 430 ALPR.pdf
-APD_Axon Fleet Contract.pdf

In the previous request APD2025-441, the City of Ashland was asked for:
 (1) all policies CITY/COUNTY NAME has that oversee and/or regulate the operation and use of Automated License Plate Readers, including the operation and use of Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares (2) a copy of any and all invoices CITY/COUNTY NAME has between any and all Automated License Plate Readers softwares and programs, including Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares (3) a map of all ALPR cameras that CITY/COUNTY NAME owns, operates or has access to (4) a copy of any and all license and user agreements, contracts, memorandums of understanding or other similar type documents that describe and/or regulate the use, retention, collection, and sharing of ALPR data including but not limited to the agreements between Flock, Vigilant, Axon, or any similar ALPR programs and softwares 

It is my understanding that the City does not possess any additional records related to the above request, and therefore, the only responsive records were Policy 430 ALPR.pdf and APD_Axon Fleet Contract.pdf. However, if you have additional records request to (1), (2), (3), or (4), please produce those as well.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Southern Oregon Flock Off

communications.subject: Oregon Public Records Law Request: Medford Police (OR) Flock "immigration" searches
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Oregon Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting copies of all audit logs, search logs, or usage reports related to your agency's use of Flock "ALPR" systems for the period of January 1, 2025 through the date this request is processed, and which include any and all searches conducted for the listed reason:

-   Immigration

 This log should include but is not limited to:

-   Records of license plate searches performed by agency personnel
-   Timestamps of searches
-   User identification information (names, badge numbers, or user IDs)
-   Any associated case numbers or investigation references

Some of these records may be available as the "Organization Audit" and "Network Audit" in the Flock software's "Insights" section.

Please provide records in their original electronic format (CSV, Excel, or similar) where possible.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Southern Oregon Flock Off

title: Medford PD - Oregon Flock audit logs for ICE requests

communications.subject: Oregon Public Records Law Request: Medford PD - Oregon Flock audit logs for ICE requests
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Oregon Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting copies of all audit logs, search logs, or usage reports related to your agency's use of Flock "ALPR" systems for the period of January 1, 2025 through the date this request is processed, and which include any searches conducted by and/or on behalf of any of the following agencies:

-   Department of Homeland Security
-   Homeland Security Investigations
-   US Border Patrol
-   United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement

 This log should include but is not limited to:

-   Records of license plate searches performed by agency personnel
-   Timestamps of searches
-   User identification information (names, badge numbers, or user IDs)
-   Any associated case numbers or investigation references

Some of these records may be available as the "Organization Audit" and "Network Audit" in the Flock software's "Insights" section.

Please provide records in their original electronic format (CSV, Excel, or similar) where possible.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Southern Oregon Flock Off

communications.subject: Oregon Public Records Law Request: Bend Flock Records 2024-2026
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Oregon Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am looking for a copy of all public records previously produced from 2024 to the present and related to the use of Flock and any other Automated License Plate Readers (ALPRs) in the City, including cameras used by the Bend Police. Previously produced records may include maps, contracts, user agreements, audit logs, and other similar items. By requesting previously produced records, I am hopeful that this request will require minimal labor to locate, review and produce the records. Please let me know if you have any questions. This request is per ORS 192.001 to 192.990.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Southern Oregon Flock Off
